prompt: A vibrant Japanese airline advertisement poster in glossy anime style, vertical composition, featuring a stylish young female idol-inspired traveler standing in the foreground at an airport apron with a pink-and-white passenger airplane behind her. The plane is branded peach in large lowercase letters on the fuselage and tail. Bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds, airport terminal buildings in the distance, and scattered confetti-like geometric shapes in pink and yellow create an energetic promotional mood. The character has long split-color hair, black on one side and vivid pink on the other, with cat-ear-like hair accessories or headphones, side clips, and a single ahoge strand. Her face is partially obscured by a centered rectangular blur block. She wears large metallic headphones, a silver choker, a black mesh crop top layered over a black bralette, a short black-and-white asymmetrical skirt with two front buckles, a glossy oversized pink bomber jacket slipping off the shoulders, and a teal thigh strap. She poses with one hand reaching toward the viewer and the other holding a pink boarding pass or ticket card branded with the airline name. Add a second floating ticket on the right side reading “Everywhere!” in English. Use a bold commercial layout with exactly 8 distinct text areas: 1 large top-left logo reading peach, 1 handwritten Japanese slogan across the upper left, 1 central promotional headline block in Japanese reading 学生割引, 1 blue circular badge reading U25限定!, 1 large discount callout reading 20%OFF!, 3 rounded white icon boxes along the bottom each with small pink travel-related icons and Japanese captions, and 1 cursive English tagline at bottom left reading Fly Peach. Love Life.. Include a small search-bar style UI element at the bottom right, extra diagonal pink graphic borders at the top and bottom, and polished ad-design typography. High-saturation pink palette, youthful urban fashion, dynamic perspective, crisp cel-shaded rendering with soft airbrushed lighting, premium anime promotional poster aesthetic.
